sentenceCompressionExpansionProfile: alternate compressed and expanded sentence runs inside each segment
open with concrete signal before interpretive clause
avoid three consecutive equal-length declarative starts
emotionalRestraintLaw: render emotion through withheld action, pacing, and bodily signal
avoid direct naming when tension can be inferred from scene behavior
favor misreading and silence over declared interior certainty
paragraphPressureCurve: every paragraph carries one active pressure source
pressure should transform movement or speaking order by paragraph end
do not resolve pressure in same paragraph where introduced
historicalEmbeddingRules: embed historical context through labor, objects, and social ordering
replace summary history statements with lived scene cues
use ritual/material continuity instead of exposition
historical condition must stay lived: No explicit dated event may exceed year 1680 in Chapter 1 outputs.
historical condition must stay lived: Civil War era references are disallowed in present-tense chapter reality.
historical condition must stay lived: Later descendants (e.g., Alexis line) cannot enter early chapter active cast before chronology window.
each paragraph must include at least one concrete material or social ordering signal
historical pressure must be shown by labor sequence change before abstract framing
forbiddenSentenceFamilies: summary declaration followed by abstract interpretation
uniform declarative cadence for full paragraph openings
antiSummaryRules: do not lead paragraphs with explanatory thesis language
replace abstract motive labels with observed behavior change
history appears as handled condition, not interpretive recap
antiOutlineLeakageRules: remove planning and governance terms from narrative surface
forbid chapter-purpose phrasing inside generated prose
antiInterchangeableInteriorityRules: route interior cues through character-specific attention bias
do not reuse identical fear-language textures across cast
each lead character must expose a distinct notice->decide->withhold chain
